node.text: James won an online gaming tournament last week and found the experience exciting and motivating.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "gaming tournament purpose") on Session 16 (Score: 0.92)
Matched atom(content =~ "purpose gaming tournament") on Observation 1 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: The game 'Witcher 3' inspired James to create his own game, pushing him to make something special.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "gaming tournament purpose") on Session 27 (Score: 0.96)
Matched atom(content =~ "purpose gaming tournament") on Observation 3 (Score: 0.89)

node.text: James bought air tickets to Toronto and plans to visit Vancouver as well.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "gaming tournament purpose") on Session 16 (Score: 0.92)
Matched atom(content =~ "purpose gaming tournament") on Observation 4 (Score: 0.54)

node.text: James expressed a desire to create more games in different genres and explore new ideas in game development.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "gaming tournament purpose") on Session 27 (Score: 0.96)

node.text: John supports James and expresses gratitude for John's support.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "gaming tournament purpose") on Session 27 (Score: 0.96)

node.text: James created and released his first game for the gaming community recently, which he found exciting.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "gaming tournament purpose") on Session 27 (Score: 0.96)

node.text: James feels fulfilled seeing players engage with the game world he created.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "gaming tournament purpose") on Session 27 (Score: 0.96)

node.text: James plans to return from his trip on July 20 and intends to bring back a souvenir for John.
